name: Apple Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Pour the sliced apples into a casserole dish.
2. In a separate bowl, whisk together 2 egg whites, 4 tablespoons of boiling water, 1 cup of flour, 1/2 teaspoon of salt, and 1 1/2 teaspoons of baking powder until combined.
3. Slowly pour the batter over the apples in the casserole dish.
4. Bake at 350°F for about 30 minutes, or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
